title: Avoiding waterfall with parallel data fetching
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Start parallel; Suspense waits for slowest.
2. RR loaders parallel.

title: Bulk insert performance
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. COPY for very bulk.
2. Multi-row INSERT batches.
3. Transaction wraps.

title: WebSocket message batching
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Buffer + flush at interval.
2. Reduce framing overhead.

title: Reducing CLS from web fonts swap
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. See perf-023.
solution: // see perf-023

title: Promise chain retaining
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Don't hold resolved promises.
2. AbortController for cancellation.

title: avoiding regex catastrophic backtracking
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Avoid (a+)+, (a|a)+.
2. Use safe-regex linter.
3. RE2 engine for safety.

title: Avoiding render-then-fetch
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Fetch in router loader (before mount).
2. RR/Next pattern.
solution: // see perf-091

title: Dependency-cruiser for unused deps
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Regular audit.
2. CI alert on unused.
solution:
// pnpm dlx knip
// or depcheck

title: Avoiding triggers in hot path
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Move heavy work async (queue).
2. Triggers for cheap consistency only.
solution: // see migration-061

title: Image CDN for resizing
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Image CDN (Cloudinary, Cloudflare) auto-resizes per device.
2. srcset directs.
solution: // CDN URL with width

title: Avoiding render thrash from window events
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Throttle resize via rAF or throttle.

title: Avoiding LIKE '%foo%' on big tables
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. pg_trgm for similarity (perf-201).
2. Full-text search.
solution: // see migration-201

title: Webpack splitChunks tuning
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Cache groups for vendor split.
2. Per-chunk max size.

title: Critical CSS extraction
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Tools: critters, beasties (Vite plugin).
2. Inline above-fold CSS; defer rest.

title: Avoiding React Query cache bloat
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. gcTime evicts unused.
2. removeQueries for explicit.

title: Worker pool for image processing
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Piscina worker pool.
2. Sharp is fast but still blocks if not pooled.

title: Avoiding excessive Suspense boundaries
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Group by content region.
2. Match user mental model.
solution: // see test-179

title: Request collapsing
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. In-flight dedup: return same promise.
2. TanStack does this.

title: WAL tuning for write-heavy
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. wal_buffers, max_wal_size tuned.
2. checkpoint_timeout per workload.
solution:
-- postgresql.conf
wal_buffers = 64MB
max_wal_size = 8GB
checkpoint_completion_target = 0.9

title: Image lazy-load with native loading attribute
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. loading=lazy native; well supported.
2. Above-fold: eager.
solution: // above-fold/LCP: loading="eager" fetchpriority="high"

title: Avoiding useEffect for derived state
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Derive in render.
solution: // see perf-047

title: Avoiding eager import of icons
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Named import: import {ChevronRight} from 'lucide-react'.
2. Lib must support tree-shaking.

title: Coalescing real-time updates
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Coalesce updates into batches via rAF.
2. React 18 auto-batches inside React events.

title: Avoiding NOT IN with subquery
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. NOT EXISTS handles NULL semantics better.
2. Anti-join.

title: Long-lived ref to short-lived component data

performance_problem.symptom: Cache keeps component data after unmount

reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Bounded cache.
2. Clean on unmount.
solution:
// LRU cache; clean on unmount
useEffect(() => () => cache.delete(key), [key]);

title: Connection limit per outbound target

performance_problem.symptom: Outbound to one host exhausts file descriptors

diagnosis_steps: lsof shows many to one host
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. undici Agent has connections per host.
2. Limit per target.
solution:
import {Agent} from 'undici';
const agent = new Agent({connections: 50});

title: useMemo for expensive computation
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. useMemo only when expensive.
2. Deps array correct.
solution: const sorted = useMemo(() => bigArray.sort(...), [bigArray]);

title: Modern bundle outputs
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Modern target = smaller, faster.
2. browserslist defines support.
solution:
// vite.config.ts
build: { target: 'es2022' } // or per browserslist

title: Reducing INP from React state batching opportunities
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. React 18 auto-batches.
2. flushSync to opt out (rare).

title: Performance budgets per route
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Per-route bundle limit.
2. CI fails on regression.
